Comeback Book's Soul

Once in a while resurrects an ally with 40% health. They gain a shield that blocks 70% of any damage for 5 sec.

When an allied unit is resurrected, they become immune to negative effects for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event:

Sage bot code: SL17

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
